d.metaDescription: Download {platform} videos and convert to MP3, WAV or M4A — free, fast, no signup. Paste a link and pick your quality.
d.heroSubtitle: The fastest, easiest {platform} downloader on the web. Paste a link, grab video up to 1080p, or convert to MP3 in one click — free, no signup, no limits.
d.igHeroTitle: Instagram Downloader — Reels, Posts, Profile Pictures
d.igHeroSubtitle: Download reels and videos, save post photos (carousels too) and full-size profile pictures — free, fast, no signup.
d.urlTrickDesc: Add “sentroy” to any {platform} address — type {domain} instead and you land right here, ready to download.
d.extDesc: Adds a red download button right on {platform} — paste nothing, just click.
d.extStep1: Download the .zip and unzip it into a folder.
d.extStep4: Click “Load unpacked” and pick the unzipped folder.
d.extStep5: Open any {platform} video — the red button appears.
d.blogIndexDesc: Practical, no-nonsense guides for downloading and converting {platform} content — video, MP3 and more.
d.errInvalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid {platform} link.
d.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please check the link and try again.
d.errRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
d.errExpired: This download link expired. Please start again.
d.errQuota: You've used all 5 of today's free downloads. Please try again tomorrow.
d.quotaReached: Daily download limit reached — resets tomorrow.
d.how1Body: Copy the {platform} URL and paste it into the box above.
d.how2Body: Choose video quality or convert to MP3 / WAV / M4A audio.
d.how3Body: Your file is prepared on our servers and deleted within 1 hour.
d.faq1A: Yes. Sentroy Downloader is completely free with no signup required.
d.faq2A: MP4 video in up to 1080p, or audio extracted as MP3, WAV or M4A.
d.faq3A: No. Prepared files are automatically deleted from our servers within 1 hour.
d.faq4A: No account, no app, no extension — just paste a link in your browser.
d.footerTos: Only download content you own or have permission to use. You are responsible for complying with each platform's terms of service.
d.footerExploreDesc: Sentroy is a developer platform — email, storage, auth and secrets in one SDK. This downloader is one of our free tools.
d.toolsHeroTitle: Every tool you need, in one place
d.toolsHeroSubtitle: Convert, compress and edit files right in your browser — plus paid creator tools. Free, fast, no signup required.
d.toolsMetaDescription: A growing set of free online tools — PDF, image and video utilities that run in your browser, plus paid creator tools.
d.toolComingSoonBody: This tool is on its way. We are putting the finishing touches on it — check back shortly.
d.toolGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
d.igViewsNeedCredits: Buy a pack below to get view credits.
d.igViewsValidity: Credits are valid for 45 days. Unused credits expire after that.
d.igViewsBadLink: Enter a valid Instagram post or reel link
d.igViewsOrderOk: Order placed (#{id}). Views are on the way.
d.imgResizeDrop: Drop an image or click to select
d.imgResizePrivacy: Your image never leaves your device
d.imgResizeTooBig: Output too large — pick a smaller size
d.imgConvDrop: Drop images or click to select
d.imgConvFormats: Multiple files · PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, BMP, AVIF
d.imgConvPrivacy: Your images never leave your device
d.imgCompPrivacy: Your images never leave your device
d.audPrivacy: Your files never leave your device
d.audNotMedia: Please select audio or video files
d.qrTooLong: Text too long for a QR code
d.jpgPdfDrop: Drop images to combine into a PDF
d.jpgPdfHint: JPG, PNG, WEBP · in order, multiple
d.pdfNote: Note: rasterizes pages (best for image/scanned PDFs); text becomes non-selectable.
d.dnsHint: Enter a domain and pick a record type
d.ogHint: Enter a URL to preview its social share card
d.pdfMergeNeed2: Add at least 2 PDFs to merge
d.pdfSplitHint: Into single pages or a page range
d.pdfSplitEachNote: Splits into {count} separate PDFs (one per page).
d.trimDrop: Drop an audio or video file to trim
d.trimHint: Drag the edges on the waveform to select
d.trimDragHint: Drag region edges to set start/end
d.bgDrop: Drop an image to remove its background
d.bgHint: Works best on people & portraits · PNG output
d.bgNote: AI model loads once (~one-time download). Everything runs in your browser.
d.favDrop: Drop an image to generate favicons
d.favHint: Square PNG works best (≥512px) · ICO + manifest + all sizes
d.favIncludes: ZIP includes: favicon.ico, 16/32/48 PNG, apple-touch-icon, android-chrome 192/512, site.webmanifest + HTML snippet.
d.toolsGuidesDesc: Step-by-step guides for the most-searched conversions and tasks — each one runs the tool right on the page.
d.whoisNotFound: No registration data found — the domain may be unregistered, or its TLD has no RDAP service.
d.whoisTimeout: The lookup timed out. Try again.
d.officeDrop: Drop your file here or click to upload
d.officeFailed: Conversion failed. The file may be corrupt or an unsupported format.
d.officeServerNote: This converter processes your file on our server (LibreOffice) and deletes it immediately after. Files are never stored.
d.officePdfToWordNote: Note: PDF has no document structure, so PDF → Word results are approximate — layout and formatting may shift. Best for text-heavy PDFs.
d.sheetPrivacy: Converted in your browser — never uploaded
d.sheetXlsxNote: CSV and JSON export the selected sheet; XLSX keeps all sheets.
d.v2gDrop: Drop a video to turn into a GIF
d.v2gHint: MP4, WebM, MOV · trimmed & converted in your browser
d.imgConvHeicFail: Could not decode this HEIC file
d.vcDrop: Drop your {from} video here or click to browse
d.vcHint: Convert {from} to {to} in your browser — your file never leaves your device.
d.vcUnsupported: Couldn't convert to {to} — your browser may not support encoding it (try Chrome, Edge or Safari), or this file's codec isn't supported.
